prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis for ITW (Illinois Tool Works), assuming an annualized volatility of approximately 25% which is typical for industrial stocks. For an 18-day horizon, this translates to roughly 4.6% daily volatility scaled appropriately. The point estimate assumes slight positive drift typical of established industrial companies. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions around the geometric Brownian motion model, with wider intervals reflecting increased uncertainty over the 18-day period.
